title: Plasticxo Revamp (Skinny)
description: A Revamp made by Akooa of my pack Plasticxo (with Skinny swords)
body:
This Plasticxo Revamp made by Akooa is a 1.8.9 pvp texture pack made for bedwars but usable in other 1.8.9 gamemodes as well.

It features a very "Plastic" themed with thick black borders arround items.

It was release due to my channel reaching 300 subscribers !

It's the Skinny version of the pack, there is also a Classic swords & a Thick sword variant both available on my account :)

Here are some ingame screenshots :


![Plasticxo Skinny Revamp - 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d4b23c9216625f1c5903cee514e2d1f976cc3af.jpeg)

![Plasticxo Skinny Revamp - 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5152a1deaef61732d0c162e67c198fd7e00c818.jpeg)

![Plasticxo Skinny Revamp - 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f61eaa436f7ce2f86df2089ee8f3808e605d20f.jpeg)


Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
